CustomField.description: Use with field "Disaster or Emergency". Comments about how this household was impacted by indicated disaster or emergency, and the services provided by program. Tip: HomeKeeper best practice is to create new Service File if household impacted by multiple incidents, over time. See HomeKeeper Support.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comments about how this household was impacted by indicated disaster or emergency, and the services provided by program. Tip: HomeKeeper best practice is to create new Service File if household impacted by multiple incidents, over time.
CustomField.label: Disaster or Emergency Notes
